allow: Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('esabong.db'\); console.log\('Recent finished fights:'\); console.log\(db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id, fight_number, status, result FROM fights WHERE status='finished' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5\\"\).all\(\)\); console.log\('Bets on those:'\); console.log\(db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id, user_id, fight_id, side, amount, payout, status FROM bets WHERE fight_id IN \(SELECT id FROM fights WHERE status='finished'\) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20\\"\).all\(\)\); console.log\('Users:'\); console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT id, username, balance FROM users'\).all\(\)\);")
